response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The lyrics matched the provided reference JSON, but several key differences were corrected using the primary fallback (on-screen hardcoded lyrics). For instance, 'gotta make my fantasy' was corrected to '煌めく my fantasy' (kirameku my fantasy), and 'like a nosas' was corrected to 'like hypnosis'.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference JSON was extremely helpful but required corrections based on precise visual and acoustic checks of the video.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were timed using exact visual and acoustic transitions. A silent screen card representing the song title 'DARK ARIA <LV2>' was mapped using the visual rule. Continuous rapid segments were truncated and aligned instantly to avoid delays.

subtitles.english: Ah, ah...

subtitles.original: Can I get it, get it, get all your attention?
subtitles.english: Can I get it, get it, get all your attention?

subtitles.original: I bet you don't know me yet.
subtitles.english: I bet you don't know me yet.
To your very depths,
with a piercing gaze.
Overflowing...
IQ ammo...
I'll conquer the world.

subtitles.original: A catalyst, I know, when I say go.
subtitles.english: A catalyst, I know, when I say go.
Put your hands up!
In the midst of chaos,
the goddess has descended.

subtitles.original: I feel it up, got it ice-cold on my body.
subtitles.english: I feel it up, got it ice-cold on my body.

subtitles.original: You wanna know, but you don't.
subtitles.english: You wanna know, but you don't.
An innovation that shakes the world.

subtitles.original: I'mma go, I'mma shine, shine, shine, shine.
subtitles.english: I'mma go, I'mma shine, shine, shine, shine.

subtitles.original: Can't stop 煌めく my fantasy,
subtitles.english: Can't stop my sparkling fantasy,
now you see.
Drinking in...
...and being dyed in the starry sky.
Hidden deep within my universe,
come find me now.

subtitles.original: Hear the voice that's calling out.
subtitles.english: Hear the voice that's calling out.

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ世界の真髄を
subtitles.english: The essence of a world yet unseen...
...I will show it to you.

subtitles.original: Baby, for now, calm down, let me focus.
subtitles.english: Baby, for now, calm down, let me focus.
Under my spell, like hypnosis.
